metadata.title: PayFarGo | Send money across the globe
metadata.description: Secure, instant transfers and bill pay for loved ones in Africa, Latin America, and the Caribbean.

hero.headline: Easy way to send money across the globe
hero.bodyLead: A secure and instant way to send money and pay bills for your loved ones in

dontMissOut.title: Global transactions, reimagined
dontMissOut.subtitle: Experience the future of international money transfers with the fastest, most secure way of sending and receiving funds abroad.
dontMissOut.card1Body: Send money to family and friends across the globe quickly and without stress, with secure and reliable transfers you can trust, so they receive it right when it matters most.
dontMissOut.card2Body: Receive funds from countries across the globe without hassle, with a streamlined experience that ensures speed, security, and access to your money in less than 24 hours.

seamless.imageAlt: Customer checking PayFarGo on a smartwatch at an outdoor cafe
seamless.title: Seamless Transfers Across Borders
seamless.body: Bank beyond borders with a simpler, smarter experience. Send and Receive international payments quickly, securely, and without hassle.

why.title: Why Choose PayFarGo?
why.subtitle: We've built a network that bypasses traditional banking intermediaries, allowing us to move capital faster than ever before.
why.f1Desc: Money arrives in minutes across several countries across the globe. Real-time processing for the digital age.
why.f2Desc: Zero hidden charges. We use the real-time market rate, ensuring you get the most out of every cent.
why.f3Desc: Military-grade encryption and multi-factor authentication protect your assets and transactions 24/7.

faq.title: FAQs
faq.stillBody: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.
faq.q0: How long does a transfer take?
faq.a0: Most transfers arrive within minutes to few hours, depending on the destination country and payment method. We provide real-time tracking so you always know the status.
faq.a1: We support corridors across Africa, Latin America, and the Caribbean, with send markets including the EU, USA, UK, UAE, Canada, and Australia. Availability can vary by corridor—check the app for the latest destinations.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: Depending on your region, you can fund transfers with bank transfer, debit card, and mobile money where supported. We show eligible options before you confirm each payment.
faq.a3: We use strong encryption, secure infrastructure, and vetted partners. Multi-factor authentication and monitoring help protect your account and transactions around the clock.
faq.a4: Fees depend on corridor, amount, and payment method. You see the full cost—including exchange rate—before you send, with no hidden charges in the quote we show you.
faq.q5: Can I set up recurring transfers?
faq.a5: Yes. You can schedule repeat transfers for family support or regular bills where the feature is enabled for your corridor, so you spend less time on repeat setup.

downloadCta.subtitle: Redefine global capital movement with precision and transparency

footer.newsletterBody: Stay updated with the latest news, exclusive offers, and important updates from PayFarGo!

metadata.title: About PayFarGo
metadata.description: Learn how PayFarGo makes global payments feel personal with simple, fast, and secure transfers worldwide.

aboutPage.heroLead: We connect people and businesses across borders with technology that is transparent, human, and built for the way you already live and work.
aboutPage.whySubtitle: We designed every step of the experience around clarity, speed, and trust.
aboutPage.aboutImageAlt: Smiling customer using PayFarGo on phone and tablet outside a modern building
aboutPage.pillar1Body: Clear pricing, guided flows, and support that speaks your language so sending or receiving money never feels like paperwork.
aboutPage.pillar2Body: Optimized rails and partner coverage help funds move quickly across corridors, with status you can follow from send to delivery.
aboutPage.pillar3Body: Bank-grade encryption, strong authentication, and monitored infrastructure help protect your account and every transfer.
aboutPage.missionBody: Our mission is to make life easier and more comfortable for customers everywhere. We invest in cutting-edge technology and partnerships so cross-border money feels as straightforward as paying a friend next door while meeting the compliance and security standards you expect from a financial platform.
aboutPage.locationsSubtitle: Countries where we operate across the globe
aboutPage.contactSupportDesc: Our friendly team is here to help.
aboutPage.contactSalesDesc: Questions or queries? Get in touch!

metadata.title: FAQs | PayFarGo
metadata.description: Answers about transfers, fees, security, and your PayFarGo account. Still stuck? Chat with our team.

faqsPage.heroLead: Have questions? We're here to help.
faqsPage.card0Title: Is my money safe when I send with PayFarGo?
faqsPage.card0Body: Yes. We use strong encryption, trusted partners, and monitoring to protect transfers end to end. Our team can help you get started securely.
faqsPage.card1Title: Can I edit or cancel a transfer?
faqsPage.card1Body: Depending on status and corridor, you may cancel or edit before funds are released. Open the transfer in the app or speak with support for the options available to you.
faqsPage.card2Body: If a transfer cannot be completed, we follow partner rules and timing for that corridor. Contact support and we will explain the status and next steps.
faqsPage.card3Title: Can I add a note or reference for the recipient?
faqsPage.card3Body: Where the corridor supports it, you can include a short message or reference so your recipient recognizes the transfer.
faqsPage.card4Title: What payment methods can I use?
faqsPage.card4Body: Options vary by region and can include bank transfer, debit card, and mobile money. The app shows every eligible funding method before you confirm.
faqsPage.card5Title: How do I change my account email?
faqsPage.card5Body: You can update the email on your profile from the PayFarGo app or website account settings. For security, we may ask you to verify the new address.
faqsPage.stillBody: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

metadata.title: Contact Us | PayFarGo
metadata.description: Reach the PayFarGo team for support, partnerships, or product questions. We're here to help.

contactPage.heroTitle: We'd love to hear from you.
